name: Dislike eco news by id -- @1.3
fullName: Dislike Eco News: Dislike eco news by id

steps.name: Given I am an authorized user
When I send request to dislike eco news with id "2"
Then the response status code should be 404
And ('the response message post request should be "Eco new doesn't exist by this id: 2"')

parameters.name: message
parameters.value: Eco new doesn't exist by this id: 2

parameterValues: Eco new doesn't exist by this id: 2
